mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV_TRANS_HIS ( PLANT_CD, TRANS_NO, TRANS_DT, TRANS_TYPE, TRANS_REASON, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, TRANS_QTY, UNIT, FROM_WAREHOUSE_CD, TO_WAREHOUSE_CD, FROM_LOCATION_CD, TO_LOCATION_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_NO, REF_ID, VENDOR_CD, TRANS_USER_ID, TRANS_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{transNo}, #{transDt}, #{request.transType}, #{request.transReason}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.lotNo}, #{request.transQty}, #{request.unit}, #{request.fromWarehouseCd}, #{request.toWarehouseCd}, #{request.fromLocationCd}, #{request.toLocationCd}, #{request.refType}, #{request.refNo}, #{request.refId}, #{request.vendorCd}, #{request.transUserId}, #{request.transRmk}, #{request.regUserId}, NOW() )
